findings: Metaswarm structured-contract portion is a false positive: it runs stampede.sh with --agent-cmd true, so no commander/agent logic executes; launcher writes artifacts and test passes anyway.
Smoke test depends on tmux sessions (tmux kill-session; stampede.sh --no-attach). CI workflow does not provision tmux server; this blocks running smoke-test in CI as-is.
Single-agent smoke uses a bespoke stub agent (smoke-agent.sh) rather than stampede-agent.agent.md.
Hardcoded string greps in dry-run are whitespace-fragile.
Smoke test uses claude-haiku-4.5 for the single-agent run, which is banned per premium-only child model policy in the capsule.
